# Feature Spec: [Feature Name]

> Generated by Claude Code interview workflow. Review and edit before implementation.

## Summary

One-paragraph description of what this feature does and why it's needed.

## Goals

- What this feature achieves
- What success looks like

## Non-goals

- What this feature explicitly does NOT cover
- Features deferred to future iterations

## User stories

1. As a [role], I want to [action] so that [benefit].
2. As a [role], I want to [action] so that [benefit].

## Technical design

### API changes

| Method | Path | Request body | Response | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|-------------|
| | | | | |

### Data model changes

Describe new or modified Pydantic models, database schemas, or data structures.

### Configuration changes

New environment variables, config values, or settings fields needed.

### Dependencies

New packages or external services required.

## Implementation plan

1. Step 1 — what to build first
2. Step 2 — what depends on step 1
3. Step 3 — integration and wiring

## Edge cases and error handling

- Edge case 1: what happens when...
- Edge case 2: what happens when...
- Error scenario: how it's handled

## Testing strategy

- Unit tests: what functions/classes to test
- Integration tests: what API flows to test
- Manual verification: what to check visually or by hand
